No tea coffee facilities  The hotel was exactly how it looked in the pictures The bedroom was very spacious clean and a nice bathroom with two showers There is free water in the mini bar but no tea coffee facilities but I think this is the case in most hotels in Barcelona The room we had didnt have any view just looked out onto the street but we were out early in the morning and in late at night so it was ideal for our needs Some hotels in the centre and especially la Rambla have small balconies overlooking the street and it would be nice to sit in the evening with a drink and people watch The location of this hotel is about a 15 min walk from the centre and sometimes in the evening on our way back to the hotel after a long day siteseeing we wished it was closer But we enjoy walking so it didnt bother us too much Overall a good choice hotel for us
Having to leave   Wonderful welcome Friedly reception staff Lovely room Super comfortable bed Easy walking distance to city centre A clean bright elegant hotel
absolutely nothing   I liked the silence of the room No traffic noise This is for Barcelona extraordinair for a hotel of this class And the situation of the hotel was for me just fantastic

The room needed a good cleaning superficial daily cleaning is fine but when there is visible dirt in the corners as an example then it needs a good clean This is not a staff issue but a staff training issue Also two people in the room need more than one device internet connection To limit it to one especially when there are two people in the room or even if only one is simply insufficient and the first time in all my travels I have encountered this Yes it can be resolved by paying a premium fee for more devices but that is hardly responsive into today s wired global world   The hotel was fine room quiet staff responsive and location good Subject to my comment about what needs to be improved I would recommend it

Even a highly critical person couldn t fault this hotel All was great  Rooms perfect Staff very friendly and beds very comfortable Buffet breakfast was amazing The hotel was very clean and we would highly recommend it to anyone staying in Barcelona Very central

Everything was fine Barcelona accommodation seems relatively expensive in general Ayre Hotel Aspe was relatively good value considering location   Very helpful and friendly staff who seemed to be able to speak several languages Having a car it was good to have access to a secure car park although it does cost extra unless you have a superior room A good breakfast 13 euro per person A quiet room for sleeping
Breakfast is not worth the money but there is a nice bakery nearby   Good location not far from 2 metro stations Area is more residential than touristy

I enjoyed my stay at Arye Hotel Caspe The lobby check in area was modern and well kept the room bathroom was very spacious and clean My check in was a little slow but overall staff was helpful answering questions It s about a 10min walk to passig de gracia and a little further to the catalunya station It was a safe neighborhood to walk around at night Many busses picked up a block away I would stay there again

The location of the Metro stations near the hotel could have been highlighted in the hotel s publicity   The staff were extremely helpful in providing directions to sites we wished to visit Maps were provided

Did not eat any food but went to the bar on two occasions and the bar staff were fantastic especially the gentleman who had a great rapport wit myself and my girlfriend Reception staff were also super friendly and polite and the room was perfect for us Kindest regards Peter
The location was convenient and close to a metro station Lots of little shops and restaurants all walking distance from the hotel The staff were very helpful and friendly I would stay here again
It s expensive comparing to other hotels nearby   The hotel was clean and the bed was confy The colors of the room was nice The stuff were nice

Wifi was v weak except in lobby breakfast was 13 euro pricy compared w nearby competition   Staff were v helpful recommended restaurants called us taxis helped carry baggage great breakfast good english modern comfy quiet street in big busy Barcelona
All was brilliant apart from the Wi fi it was sporadic  Wonderful breakfast fabulous staff comfortable hotel in a great location Will definitely stay again

The wi fi signal was a little low in our room but the one from the looby was running ok   Very good and quiet location lots of markets coffe bars and restaurants in the area nice and clean room air conditioning runs ok minibar in the room the guests can use a PC with printer at the reception wi fi works fine in the reception the elevators were running smooth and fast the personal is nice and polite they can keep your bags safely at the reception before doing the check in or after check out

Staff were incredibly helpful and good at their jobs Bed was terrific Breakfast was a highlight so many choices and I have a restricted diet due to health the choices meant that I had a great breakfast and the staff were very helpful We loved our stay and will definitely go back
Room was very clean and comfy Hotel was exactly as it looks in the photos Staff were very friendly Handy for walking to La Rambla in about 30 mins and to Sagrada Familia in around 20 25 mins

The hotel was perfect I had a really great stay and the hotel staff are simply amazing They re simply the best Conveniently located and in a quiet area It is quite close to the Sagrada Familia to the best bar spots in town as well as to the beach and the city proper I would definitely stay there again and I would definitely recommend to everyone

We had an interior room which had no outside facing window it had an interior facing window which i found a little depressing having no daylight This was room 501 Also it was a bit of a trek to the main places of interest   the staff where very helpful and the rooms comfortable

Nothing to be honest I would go back there without hesitation   Good location only 10 mins walk to La Rambla and the Sagrada Familia Hotel very clean and rooms very comfortable Room serviced daily and friendly and helpful staff Excellent value for money bearing in mind the location

Really enjoyed my stay here Great location friendly helpful staff and good value for money Pay no attention to precious people complaining about unimportant things like having problems with wifi speed It s all nonsense Would highly recommend this hotel

Can not think of any  The staff were very friendly and helpful always ready to serve with a smile I didn t eat the breakfast but it did look very good in the restaurant The hotel was always very clean

Nothing  The staff members were very helpful and friendly The food in the restaurant and bar was good and well priced Our room was a nice size modern and very comfortable Housekeeping did a great job of keeping our room clean and tidy The location was a short distance from the heart of Barcelona but we really liked being in a quieter part of the city

You can not open the window in the rooms and the bathrooom s door is like a curtain you can t close it I hate that   Its close to everything on foot Breakfast is fine They have a glutenfree and sugarfree special food if you need There is fridge in the room Air conditioner s location is good in the room Gym is good

Only stayed one night was put in a small room with windows that faced the atrium and hallways where others walked No outside view Strange light   Good location not the center Fair price Excellent staff super easy check in check out Held bags after check out without a problem

Our room s window was facing the inside of the building There s one such room on every floor check whether you can have a better one we couldn t as the place was fully booked   Close to all main sights without being in a noisy extra crowded area Good value for money

Our price did not include breakfast which we were told would cost 13 euros per head each day ouch We thought we wouldn t fork out for that as it was too hot for a buffet anyway Instead we recommend trying some of the Baracafe s you will pass if walking towards the Arc de Triomf they sell incredibly tasty pastries for 1 2 euros each which will keep you going well through the day There is also a Lidl 5 minutes down the road and enough room in your mini fridge to keep some goodies But if you ve got the money treat yourself the standard of everything else is that good I m sure the breakfast would be great   We booked this about a month in advance of our mid July trip at a surprisingly good price considering we are both uni students and can t afford anything swish Having stayed in a few more expensive hotels before we weren t expecting a grand room when we arrived something clean and small When we walked in we couldn t believe our luck The room was very spacious with plenty of storage space a not so mini mini fridge and a large flatscreen TV with a large bathroom containing not one but two showers one of which was a walk in Things just got better from there you re 20 minutes walk from La Rambla 5 minutes walk to the Arc de Triomf and its metro station 20 minutes to the Gothic Quarter and 30 40 minutes from the beach depending on temperature Amazing The room was always cleaned exceptionally well with little movement of your belongings so you didn t feel your personal space had been invaded By the third day it felt like home A great place to stay with friendly staff and lovely spacious rooms Recommend 100

Sound insulation between rooms I can hear people when they walk in the room next to us or when they talk in the hall but it didn t disturb our sleep   Confortable bed nice location rooms are equipped with both bathtub and showers
Blocked shower drain said we would have a terrace over looking the city Just a glass window no terrace overlooking people s apartments

Definitely NOT a 4 star Hotel despite managements protestations to the contrary Over priced for what you get NOT a great location a solid 20 minute walk to the centre of town the majority of attractions NO TEA COFFEE facilities provided in room When we requested these it took several days for them to arrive WIRELESS was so SLOW we gave up trying to use it Initial room we were allocated was EXTREMELY NOISY we could clearly hear when people in the next room used the toilet had sex etc street traffic noise was bad Staff were helpful in moving us to another room but this was still VERY NOISY Hotel management claims rooms are sound proofed but this was certainly not our experience Lots of young exchange students staying at the hotel contributed to a rather noisy environment

The bed lacked any kind of pillow top cushion that we found in our other hotels around Spain   Marc at the front desk was very helpful directing us to points of interest He was also very helpful with parking
The bathtube wasn t working The breakfast could be less expensive or with a special rate for online booking   Confortable room Breakfast 13 euros

The rental bike broke when I was ridding it and it took me hours to get back to the hotel walking with the bike it was bad luck I guess  They have gluten free breads and parking garage is very convenient and easy to park They also have rental bikes which is also super however mine resulted broken but for that reason they reimburse me the rental for the bike which was nice

The bed was really hard Might as well have slept on the floor I didn t have a decent nights sleep in the 5 nights that I stayed there The headboard and pillow was a mismatch too and made sitting up watching TV really uncomfortable Although what we had tasted nice there isn t a lot of choice for dinner in the hotel restaurant   The location was good 5 10 minute walk to Tetuan Metro station and probably a 10 15 minute walk to Arc de Triomf The breakfast had lots of choice however you would have to get down there early One day we went down around 8 45 and noticed things weren t being restocked for example the Greek yoghurt eggs and bacon Hotel was clean Staff were friendly and helpful
THE HOTEL WAS ONLY 15 MINS WALK TO CENTRE OF CITY AND THE Sagra Familia Astaff member Marcus deserves the highest acclaimation for his high level of customer service at reception

It would have been an added bonus to have had a sun terrace and a dipping pool as the weather was so hot Tea making facilities would have been nice too but then we are British   Great friendly and helpful staff extremely clean good central location

The bed was kind of hard for my back Did not meet my request upon booking for extra sets of towels until I requested them upon arrival Also iron and iron board not available in the room unless you request them No coffee maker and coffee or tea in the room When we checked in noticed the two ladies chatting while checking us in which was annoying because we traveled for 14 hours and needed some rest so just thinking that they should have asked us how was our flight and expedited our check in process sooner   The buffet breakfast except same kind of food is served each morning The front desk staff are so helpful every time we need a taxi to go to the city center Also helped me with their lobby computer which had a connection problem night before our departure but was resolved right away

We both found the beds extremely uncomfortable The shuttle service is not complimentary as it might sugges on the website You have to pay cash to the driver before you leave the airport You cannot choose the time you want to be picked up when you go back to the airport We had a 5pm flight and they wanted to pick us up at 11 30 It took the Receptionist a couple of phone calls to get them to change pick up to 2pm And still we had to go to each hotel to pick up people for an hour before arriving at the airport Take a taxi more direct less wasted time for only a couple of more   Friendly staff

4 Star on assessment day but not in reality Here s the list 1 Mould in shower bathroom resembled student flat and splash marks plus water swelling damage on bathroom door 2 Missing top to plug sink lever 3 Room service hit and miss dirty glasses not removed no soap left on one occasion sticky glass marks not wiped really hot sticky weather and no clean sheets for a 4 night stay 4 Advertised a mini bar which consisted of 4 bottles of water 5 Crooked draw 6 Advertised a Airport Shuttle service for anadditional cost this did not exist 7 Breakfast no fresh orange juice option just concentrated option eggs tastelss 8 Advertised as sound proof rooms not the case as difficulties sleeping with singing from other guests a constant swoosh sound every 10 minutes and then a ridicously loud radio communication to the room service that made any lie in impossible despite Do Not Disturb sign 9 Room service knocking at 9am to clean 11 After 10 minutes of viewing TV kept pixalating and it would only sort itself out if switched off and on again however this would be repeated every 10 minutes and was realy annoying 12 Uncomfortable beds  Helpful and well intentioned staff

1 We checked in at night and they said the room was not available they had overbooked which was very disappointing as we have booked months in advance We had to sleep in a small bed rather than the two singles which we have requested earlier 2 The receptionist told us they will change us to the single rooms the next morning but we went and it was STILL not ready so we kept our luggage and decided to go out 3 Rather than upgrading us to a better room this is what we got What a shame 4 The breakfast was horrible Not many options and when we ordered outside the menu it took forever and wasn t even cooked well eggs so we only tried it once and went out to cafe s the other days during out stay 5 The cleaning lady walked in our room while we were asleep in the morning despite the do not disturb sign outside the door 6 The cleaning ladies were loud and we could hear them chatting at the hall way all morning 7 The blankets were not comfortable at all it felt like a bed sheet rather than an actuall blanket 8 The hotel didn t provide good toiletries not even a conditioner 9 We asked for a taxi at the reception and they told us they won t be able to order one to the hotel so go look for one on the road Overall we had bad experience at this hotel and its a shame its called a four star hotel because clearly it doesn t live it up Definitely not coming back nor recommending it to anyone If the service was better I would have enjoyed my stay better despite the lack discomfort of their facilities   The only positive thing I can say about the hotel is its location

The location is not as central as I had hoped The hotel was not a 15 min walk from the main locations such as plaza Catalunya La Rambla the beach etc The neighbourhood wasn t clean bad smell all over the area   Clean and spacious rooms Good service at the hotel Staff helpful

I was unable to connect to the wi fi   We stayed just 2 nights in the hotel but it was quite clean close to metro station by walking just 900mt to Sagra da Famillia hotel was located in a silent area especially at nights it was peaceful also they put 4 small bottle of water in the minibar free thanks a lot

We didn t have a key to our room for 3 days and we had to ask someone to open the door for us The Wi Fi did not work one evening for a few hours   The room was very comfortable and clean The staff has good English and was very nice

This is a 3 star hotel not a 4 star one Ac was not working well in the room Complained couple of times but it was not fixed Internet was not working during the two days while there Overall it was not s great choice   Staff were kind Location is good

Not much They had an issue with the room card system which lasted for 1 day they should have fixed that earlier However they were helping you enter the room every time Slow internet  Convenient parking pretty decent and comfortable room very clean Helpful personnel They let us checkout late and leave the car parked for extra hours
The wifi signal is awful you re better off using 3G The breakfast buffet was poor No a lot of options at all Overall value for money not great

Noise cancellation between rooms can be better I heard people talking in the next room and laughing around midnights but I am an easy sleeper so I didn t mind that much I guess other s could complain about it   Good wifi connection the double bed was very comfortable location is great very close to public transports Very helpful and smiling staff at the reception all in good order

The bed a little bit hard   We spent 4 nights in this hotel and overall we have been pleased with our choice Of course the location is its first advantage walking distance to Tetuan metro station and also walking distance to Parc de la Ciutadella Cleanliness is over average they pass every day to check the room The breakfast is quite good it offers everything you d like to eat in the morning My son loved the pastry The staff is nice and helpful WiFi is working well We were not that lucky with the room position Some of the rooms have the windows oriented toward an inner courtyard and the view is not that interesting In compensation that type of room is quiet and your kids will sleep well

The bathroom had a sliding door rather than a proper closing door The room did not have any external windows   Very helpful and friendly staff Good central location for sightseeing as well as metro stations being a 5 minute walk away

At the breakfast there is a cord that is blocking people from entering the area It is very unwelcoming seems like at a club Toilet paper missing for 1 day Sunblock curtains are not very preventing sun from emtering the room at 6 00 am  Good location and welcomimg good staff

There were some room card issues they were deactivated after only a couple of days and we had to go to the reception and redo them Also one night around 4 AM someone entered our room without knowing that we re inside It was quickly resolved by the reception office The city tax is not included and has to be paid at the checkout   Staff was great very friendly and helpful Rooms very clean and roomy Quiet area and quite good location close to Sagrada Familia and to the Tetuan Arc de Triomf metro station

We could hear the phone ringing at the room next door which was the wake up alarm at 6 30am even with earplugs you could hear it   The room is quite comfortable and spacious The bathroom has a shower and a bathtub The reception at thr lobby was efficient and nice
Everything especially the cleaning and bar staff as they enhanced our stay by making us feel more welcome by always smiling and having conversations with us
Nothing could be better Thanks to the staff for all important help   Best were the staff after that the breakfast Thanks for a very good stay we recommend the hotel

The lights sometimes went out in the room but did come back on again quickly The bar shutting at 11pm is a bit early I thought but then it was quiet Had a lovely cocktail from the bar The bed was a little hard and there was a little noise from the road and the room next door   Size of the room was very good Had two showers in the double room The staff were very accommodating
its not a 4 star hotel in any way the were no facilities no tea or coffee machine no english tv channels and so on  quiet area nice staff pretty good noise isolation

This is very minor guests need to bring their own soaps The hotel soap you get one per day is tiny and made of glycerine you wash your hands four or five times and it s gone The shower gel doesn t lather well   We got everything we care about a clean and quiet room a comfortable bed and a great location We walked everywhere to the Old Town to Barceloneta to the Guad sites

I would have liked tea making facilities in my room and more English channels on the tv   Thank you for the gluten free options at breakfast the room was perfect and the bathroom was very clean with a great shower
Nothing really except the wifi was a bit weak in my room I had to go into the bathroom to get a signal   Very friendly and welcoming hotel staff Excellent breakfast too and good location
Very clean nice breakfast A great place to stay when you want to find a great hotel for reasonable price Located near arc de triomf and metro station

My room faced an inner courtyard and I would have liked to face out but I was on a budget   The staff were excellent and very friendly I really appreciated that they printed out my voucher for an attraction the next day
The staff was really kind and helpful The room was super clean The breakfast was great everything was fresh and available even close to the end of breakfast time Metro is close

Shower waste slow to empty Bar lacking ambience in the evening  Express breakfast at 4 very good Staff really helpful friendly 3pm late checkout was really useful Comfortable bed nice bathrobes showergel shampoos etc all good

Even though the pickpocket attempt failed it was not fun   The staff was particularly helpful re any question we asked The were sure to alert us to the possibility of pick pockets in Barcelona and the various ways they go about it That was great since on the morning of the second day a pick pocket attempt was made on me Since I had been well informed the attempt failed The staff s advice was priceless

I would have liked tea and coffee in the room   Staff were very friendly and helpful bathroom and room were lovely and clean and the room was a good size Breakfast was nice and had a varied choice of items available We got 4 bottles of water for free in the room also The gym room was also good with a row machine treadmill weights and bikes

No kettle in rooms and no slipper in bathrooms   Everything is Perfect Great Location good facilities excellent breakfast kind and helpful staffs big rooms and nice design Fast Wifi and reasonable price

The room was a little small for the cost but had everything needed a very comfortable bed and a nice bathroom The shower was good but the drain was partially blocked so would overflow after more than a minute or 2   Location was about 10 15 min walk from Placa de Catalunya so was easy to get around Staff were very friendly and helpful Wifi speed was good Bed was comfortable and there were 2 complimentary bottles of water per day left in the mini fridge Free use of reception PC for printing documents too

There was a dirty mark on the sheet from the day I checked in and no change for 3 nights There is no sign of changing sheet request in the room It s very inconvenient Talked to the reception when I checked out I was told that I should have talked to the reception directly if I wanted to change the sheet because the hotel normally change the sheet every 3 days This was something very different with other 4 stars hotels   Not very special

The Wifi did not work at all it is free but it doesn t work The bathroom was a bit primitive there was no tub and no shower tub You would just shower on the floor and make a mess but the personnel would clean it every day The walls were a bit thin you could hear noise coming from outside the room Overall I wouldn t rate this hotel as a 4 star hotel but more like a 3 star hotel   15 20 minutes walk to Plaza Catalunya 15 minutes walk to Sagrada Familia

Perhaps a kettle in the room so you can make a drink   Location was good It was a 15 minute walk to the Plaza de Cataluyna which is a good central location in Barcelona The very popular street Las Ramblas connects to Plaza de Cataluyna so if you walk from the hotel you could get to the gothic quarter in about 25 30mins If you don t fancy walking you could get the metro The nearest metro station to the hotel is Tetuan which is a 6 minute walk You can buy a T 10 card which gives you ten metro journeys for 10 Euros Great price To get to the gothic quarter via the metro it takes about 15 mins Another good neighbourhood is La Ribera which is a 15 minute walk from the hotel EL Born is a place lots of bars and lots of restaurants So therefore I feel the location of the hotel is very good I also liked how quick the check in was no fussing at all The hotel room was a good size and the shower is excellent I feel that this hotel is a good choice All staff were also very pleasant and friendly

Lack of swimming pool Had to re enter wifi code after short period of inactivity   Location excellent close to Sagrada Familia and metro station but quiet Bed was very big and comfortable 2 showers Staff very helpful Free wifi
Only the wifi have problems sometimes  All is perfect the staff the rooms is very clean and the location is very good I was 4 years ago This year And i think that i well come back to this hotel

No remote control for TV and only BBC World News in English   Hotel quiet and very clean Everything to hand including quick breakfast at the bar hot food cooked to order and delicious mohitos Bedroom and bathroom beautiful All staff very helpful and friendly Gym room looked great but after a full day of touristic experiences we were too tired to use it Reception staff recommended a really nice restaurant on the way into town called Mussol 19 Great atmosphere and lovely food

Noise travels easily between rooms It needs more noise insulation They need tea making facilities to be available for all rooms Not just when you pay 23 euros more per room   The bed was comfortable The room very clean

Hotel is a little far from the centre The cleaning lady starts at 9 00 because we were on holiday it was not really nice to hear the noise coming from the hall   The rooms are big enough the staff are friendly

Breakfast was a good continental standard although any cooked extras you wanted had to be ordered   Very clean and rooms serviced promptly daily Good location near tetuan metro station and most places were in east walking distance Would definitely return
We arrived very late and reccomendation to go to local tapas bar Dune for some late Tapas was disappointing Expensive and poor quality   Large airy room Quiet
Room looked onto public courtyard curtains had to be closed constantly Kettle for tea and coffee would have been appreciated  Comfortable clean room friendly staff

Room service was very slow although they did apologise without being confronted and forgo the drinks bill as a result The cafe facilities were poor the menu was limited to light snacks and had no restaurant that can be accessed at night only a light menu was offered Please note I sent a review just before this that was meant for the Hotel Luz in Castellano which was excellent I now send this one to replace it sorry for the mistake   Reception staff helpful hotel in a central position in the city Comfortable room

It is a really nice hotel Close to the metro and sights so you can walk as well room was comfy and clean and breakfast really good It was my bday and staff left me a present of cake and prosecco in the room which made it even more special We had great time

Pillows could be comfier Toiletries should be improved   Location is perfect 2 metro stations available close to the hotel Receptionist are very helpful and friendly Breakfast is good Rooms are cozy and clean
Would have liked a kettle to make coffee in room   Excellent reception desk and Maid service Very helpful informative and professional and pleasant
Too far from city centre Good 30 min walk to other attractions  In a quiet area very near basilica about 10 min walk from hotel Rooms and breakfast great
The bed was a bit uncomfortable  It was so central and easy to get to places The room was fabulous and the shower was amazing it was massive Loved the hotel
Limited cafe evening menu Limited UK satellite service   Helpful staff good service spacious good parking facilities Pleasant caf open long hours
DINNER A LITTLE DISAPPOINTING   STAFF WERE GREAT LOVELY CLEAN BIG ROOMS VERY GOOD LOCATION EVERYTHING WAS IN WALKING DISTANCE GREAT BREAKFAST

Quite costly for what you get Breakfast not worth 13 euros Plenty of cafes nearby though   Easy to get to and from if you like a walk Staff very friendly and helpful

district and neighborhood is not central Barcelona   Staff very kind breakfast not included during our booking very good and full of all kind of food Rooms are clean and lovely Very quiet at night Prices are quite high but we were lucky to find a very good offer

The breakfast is expensive And they did not provide any water heater in the room   The room is very nice with spacious bath room They even provide the baby cot for my baby which was nice But bear in mind the distance was not very close to metro station 300m from Tetuan station and around 500m from Arc de Triomph station

Breakfast was not included and iit was very expensive to buy once at the hotel The shower door wasn t wide enough and water came out all over the bathroom floor We did ask for a room with a good view as we were celebrating our anniversary but the room given to us had a small window so high up that we had to stand on a chair to look out and the view was of the car park   The staff were very helpful and the hotel was spotless The bar area was very nice

The room we stayed in was quite small for a superior room and looked lovely but was not practical I bumped my head twice on the very awkwardly placed bedside tables The bathroom was small The bed was not too comfortable There was no draught beer at the bar which is not acceptable in a four star hotel This all said we did enjoy our stay and most likely would stay again for a short break I feel we got 4 star decor but 3 star fascilities  the location was perfect for visiting all attractions in the area The hotel was very well presented and the staff were very professional and attentive The view from the room window was amazing Breakfast was good
Need to sort the television reception out Picture keeps intermittently freezing for seconds at a time making it impossible to enjoy watching anything   Location Staff
Twin room size too small for two big blokes  Close to DLR staff friendly and helpful Twin room very small moved to family room at no extra charge Breakfast good quality just needs some gronila

WiFi would not work phoned reception 4 times to report as needed to work from hotel in the morn and send Urgent emails Reception advised they would send somebody up phoned 3 more times as almost 2 hours had passed Receptionist ended up coming but could not help Complained on check out only to be told that a male who the hotel had asked to attend our room had said he had been and sorted No one other than the receptionist had been to the room and we had been unable to access WiFi which caused lots of difficulties given the work we needed to do and urgency of some communicstoons   The bar area is lovely and the evening meal was also lovely
Loved the fact the reception staff were so helpful and knowledgeable and area which bus to take etc They were a real pleasure and a credit to the hotel

Pillows could be a little softer for me I will visit with the family   It was pristine beautiful decor comfortable bed fabulous lounge and restaurant with moving fish mural and portholes to boot Room was lovely with historical facts of Greenwich etched on the glass bathroom wall

Just one thing No lock on inside of bedroom door   Clean Everything I needed including iron ironing board Relaxed Good location Nice breakfast peaceful in the breakfast room and they have an automatic pancake maker Pleasant helpful staff This is an good part of London to stay as a visitor Greenwich is nice in the evening when the tourists leave Plenty of interesting things going on Good transport links by bus or train Greenwich Dulwich Bridge zone 2 Good shopping in Canary Wharf and much quieter than west end shopping

Neither of us like air conditioning but these days there is little choice To have been able to lower the aircon a degree or two further than the system allowed would have helped However it didn t ruin our stay   A warm and helpful welcome on arrival with delightful staff where nothing was too much trouble It is spotlessly clean and for London amazingly quiet The fact that we could park our car in London was a big plus too

There was honestly nothing that I didn t like about this hotel   The hotel is beautiful overall and the rooms are very spacious The staff are friendly very considerate I will be most sure to book this hotel again

Person who telephoned pre arrival and gave incorrect info about breakfast prices and was told it was only continental breakfast available Didn t like glass door on bathroom that was opaque and gave no privacy Would have liked to know that Deptford station was closer than Greenwich   Reception staff on arrival were very helpful and friendly The room was very pleasant and clean Good range available at breakfastbreakfast

This is no real criticism as such the only thing that my wife would have liked better was the lighting in the bathroom and maybe a magnifying mirror especially for applying her make up  The staff were very friendly and professional the rooms were lovely clean and comfortable The breakfast was excellent and good value the staff were constantly on hand topping up dishes so the food was always freshly cooked tables were cleared very quickly and unobtrusively

Only problem was on the morning of check out the loo started not to flush properly   Arrived at reception and I forgot the card I made the booking on The lady was really helpful and sorted out all the details Really friendly and a great response to a problem totally my fault but the staff sorted out the problem straight away The room was lovely and very comfortable with lovely decor lovely view over Greenwich Breakfast was very good and great selection again very friendly and helpful staff I have stated here a couple of times now and most definitely stay again

The room was small but large by London standards The only negative was a cracked handbasin like that when we arrived We decided to live with it so as to avoid a more remote from reception room change   It was convenient for the Docklands Light Railway at Deptford Bridge station within a ten minute walk and thus able to link with other mass public transport The staff were very helpful with maps and advice It is a kept clean hotel

We were disappointed with the food in the restaurant and thought it was overpriced We preferred local restaurants which were cheaper and the choice of food was better   We liked the hotel very much We have stayed in other London hotels and this had a better friendlier atmosphere The room was very clean and comfortable

My daughters room was cold and a bit on the small side so she had to change rooms Bad draught through the window   Beautiful lounge and bar Quiet location but only a tube stop away from Greenwich and all its attractions and nice restaurants

The bed very comfortable Even though the room was not very big it was very comfortable and well designed And also I appreciated an electrical point for the hairdryer close to a mirror which is very seldom the case in many hotels And of course a small desk to put down the lap top when working

Wish I d realised I could control the air con from my TV instead I turned the power off at the entrance to the room meaning I couldn t charge my mobile phone overnight  A true first class royal welcome from staff in an impressive reception area The public areas of the hotel are of superb standard and the quality of the staff remained high throughout

Gym had only four machines and one was not working Despite name hotel is not in Greenwich but Deptford and further from Canary Wharf than I anticipated   Staff were friendly and professional Comfortable bed and high tech lighting etc in room Great shower

One of the rare occasions that we managed to sleep in a London hotel without being disturbed by traffic noise or loud guests in the hotel corridors Also staff were professional but there was a nice chilled out vibe Facilities all excellent and cleaned to a high standard

We had a ground floor room were unable to open the windows for ventilation so had to rely on the air conditioning The frosted bathroom window did not have a blind there was a light shining through our room all night   The hotel was in a great location for our needs and was very modern architecturally pleasing

I would have liked to have a bit more gluten free options in the restaurant menu but we were able to bring in our food into our rooms so that wasn t such a big deal Still it would have been nice to eat at the hotel restaurant at least once   I loved the room and the staff The room was extremely comfortable and we had tea making facilities which suited my mother very well The staff were so friendly and helpful They did their best to help us out whenever we had any queries
Need another coffee machine at breakfast as very busy at weekends and needed to queue   Lovely interior especially the bar Nice comfortable room with lovely shower

Staff seemed new and not properly trained no one seemed to be in charge problems with maid service room not cleaned properly on entry then not at all next day no maintenance staff available Saturday night to fix a leaking toilet bar staff unable to serve basic drinks could not make a long vodka as it was not on the menu and she didn t know what it was

We weren t allocated the room we were promised I rang the day before arrival and was promised a room on the top floor we ended up on the second floor Hence we didn t get the view mini bar and coffee machine that we paid for when booking The door didn t fit properly and we were woken several times with the door rattling every time someone came into our corridor   The breakfast was good and the staff in the restaurant were very attentive
Very unhappy about being asked to pay 50 per night for the dog to stay no mention of this when booking advertised as dog friendly No car parking available either Dinner menu was also very uninspiring

Nothing all good   Staff very helpful no problems with a late check in Not the biggest twin room I ve ever stayed in but there was a nice feel about the place and great value for money Looking forward to staying again

There was a bit of a wait to check in and there seemed to be staff standing around rather than checking guests in   We stayed in the Greenwich hotel for a festival the location was good and the hotel was decent value for money The room was clean and had all mod cons Nice bar and friendly polite staff

Car parking was an issue But we worked around it   Lovely room and view 10 mins or so walk from the centre of Greenwich 3 mins walk from DLR We had a minor issue with the room that was dealt with fantastically well and we received a complimentary gift on our return from dinner Will be happy to stay again

Absolutely delighted such a lovely stylish building inside and out modern good sized rooms with comfortable beds spotlessly clean ensuite with a good shower Unlike a lot of hotels it was quiet both in the rooms and outside the building A good breakfast was served in a splendid dining area and the bar had a very relaxed and comfortable ambience plus drink prices quite reasonable To top it all the staff were amazing very helpful and obliging they went the extra mile to help I certainly will book this hotel again and Thank you to the staff for making our stay a pleasant one

Broken shower door Cold shower every morning unacceptable Letter of apology in room missing the Petits Four   The staff were very helpful tried to sort out the problems as best they could Letter of apology in room offering Petits Fours

Nothing  The Greenwich history chronology on bathroom door was fascinating My husband liked the general feel of the building decor ambience and clear view of London from our bedroom window and balcony

The location of the hotel wasn t for me I felt as it was too good for where it was But right next to train station which helped   Great Stay one of the best hotels I have been to The room its self was unbelievable Very clean hotel and great staff I was shocked that it was the price I payed for such a great place value for money Great hotel and would stay there again

I have never been charged a deposit in advance of staying in a hotel before and I have stayed in all sorts of places all over the world It was a bit of a shock to be over 100 poorer than I had expected as I walked through the door even though I got it back at the end I couldn t enjoy it during my stay I expect a small room as a single traveller so it wasn t too much of a shock There were too many little problems though like no teabags being left by room service and a long wait in the restaurant when I asked for some I eventually gave up went out and bought some And when there is a large puddle of reddy brown water that has leaked from somewhere onto the bathroom floor I would like to at least be asked by one of the 3 investigating staff members if I would like to be moved I would have said yes Some places allow you to relax and enjoy the luxury of your stay But this was an unforgettably and undeniably extremely overpriced experience   The breakfast was good and the staff were obviously keen to help There were gluten free options for both main course and dessert at dinner I also really liked the area and was able to explore a part of London I don t know very well with ease I love the DLR I eventually discovered a local Japanese restaurant which was excellent

The only two problems was that there wasn t a bath tub and there were flies flying through the Air Conditioning vents and flying around the room My wife and I would love to book again on our anniversary but that s the only thing we re afraid of  It s really prestige love the red carpet at the entrance and the interior design The staff are friendly The rooms are spacious I booked a standard room and even that was huge Felt really serene and peaceful too

Letting people know about the door signs Because we not aware that the signs were double sided our room was not cleaned replenished and on a second occasion when we had used the door sign correctly it was not cleaned again with a note saying we could have it done by housekeeping if we let them know when we requested this there was no one in house keeping and the receptionist had to bring tea and coffee etc We ended up remaking our own beds again Also was not happy with the 30 00 per day deposit in case of breakages which not aware of until we booked into the hotel   The hotel was extremely clean and the breakfast choices very good Hotel staff were very attentive only problem was the trouble we had with the room not being serviced

The hotel has recently stopped being part of the Mercure group but seems completely the same Still comfortable with decent sized rooms good views from the upper floors and better value for money than central London Very close to Deptford Bridge DLR station

The only thing I didn t like was the 3am call asking if I had requested a toothbrush I hadn t but rest assured that if I had the staff at the Greenwich would get me one   Friendly helpfull staff clean comfy room and good food Only 2 minutes from the DLR and Tesco express and 10 minutes from lovely Greenwich shops and markets perfect for our trip

Reception a little slow on arrival but once all booked in smooth sailing Would be good if had mini bar in room Also shocked at price of breakfast if not booked in advance was 50 per person Or 12 95 if booked in advance Don t know how anyone can justify 50 for breakfast   Room a little on the small side but well laid out and comfortable Nice queen size bed and nice plush carpets The bathroom was lovely Loved the history lesson provided on bathroom door and was nice and bright Nice touch with the steam free square on mirror Definitely would stay again
Prefer Nespresso coffee in the room but tea making facility was good   Very nice room very nice bed staff were excellent Good location for the river and our friends in nearby Greenwich

Unfortunately I was in room 801 next to the lift Fab views of the nighttime city but noisy because of the lift and the swing doors leading into the corridor It sounded as though someone was moving furniture every time they were used They should have soft close doors there Parking is limited so remember to reserve a space before you get to the hotel I gave it a low comfort score purely because of the lift shaft and door noise otherwise my overall score would have been closer to 9 instead of 7 9 I will stay again   The staff were professional friendly and helpful Check in and out was quick and efficient Breakfast was good The room although on the small side was clean and comfortable
It is a bit spendy per night  Excellent staff Willing to help We were there as a wedding party for my wedding They helped with requests for amenities

I booked a queen anne double and the staff tried to give me a single room Also was charged for breakfast which was included in the room rate   The room was compact but excellent and had all you needed for a night s stay

Not being able to add breakfast at a more inclusive rate I booked it on arrival and it was a little costly   The turn down service was nice Clean Comfortable and quiet Check in was smooth and the staff friendly Breakfast was nice

Just little things like glass door to bathroom allowing light through when one of us needed to use the toilet in the night so the other is also disturbed Taps more stylish than functional   Very comfortable room of reasonable size for the two of us and good location for visiting my daughter in the Greenwich area Located in small pleasant square away from the main drag

Rooms were a little small for American standard we stayed in a queen room and at night heard water running above behind our bed Bathroom was a tad small   Breakfast was really good hotel staff was very accommodating and property was updated Had USB plugs readily available in addition to power outlets
nothing  Quiet excellent food in the restaurant excellent service throughout good choice at breakfast lovely pillows clean beautiful decor relaxing atmosphere

Decor not to my taste but probably is to most others Queen room rather small Some confusion amongst staff sometimes e g room not serviced after first night apparently not on schedule when key didn t work on third night just needed reformatting I was told initially that it had run out of power then that it might not work because I might have sat on it Nothing major just some personnel needing a bit more training experience   V clean well kept room Good varied breakfast Location convenient for Greenwich quite easy to get to town too Overall a good stay

A minor issue the room we had unfortunately had a fault with the air conditioning unit which would very occasionally make a horrible loud noise for a few seconds This was potentially a problem but as it didn t last long I told the staff about it at the end of my stay becasue I didn t want the hassle of moving all my stuff once we had settled in I m sure they would have moved us if I had asked it seemed that sort of place It was room 20 on the lower ground floor by the way  Very friendly and helpful staff throughout very clean and well presented with high quality fixtures fittings and furniture etc
Nothing   Staff fabulous Hotel lovely Room spacious with nice view great bathroom and huge comfy bed Communication brilliant when I left my sunglasses and these were posted to my home address

N A  Fantastic stay in a very well designed hotel I loved the small but very practical layout of the room and that it looks over a lovely park and quiet street yet so near public transport My favorite hotel in London and I have been to lots of others in the better category and more central locations before

The room we stayed in was a little small and required a small amount of gymnastic skill to move around The window was also quite small so natural light was not great However you get what you pay for and we were extremely satisfied   Located just a few minute walk from the DLR Deptford this hotel provides the perfect location for those wanting to stay just outside of busy central London The staff were very friendly and attentive breakfast was great and the hotel itself is very modern and well decorated The warm welcome cookie was a nice touch The room was very pleasant and the beds were certainly comfortable The bathroom was large and the shower was good Due to the location we were able to enjoy a very peaceful nights sleep and would certainly stay again The hotel has a secure car park that you can use for 17 a day which is a little pricey but fairly competitive for London

Quiet location and very comfortable rooms Walking distance to public transport or about a 20 minute walk to the Cutty Sark The staff were very courteous friendly and efficient Breakfast was a wide choice of food to suit all nationalities

The price of drinks at the bar   The variety of breakfast was very good staff were very polite and helpful not too far from the nearest station also very clean rooms air conditioning and very comfortable beds
reception staff  the staff at the reception were very poor unfriendly and seem that they do not know well their job did not expect this from a double tree by hilton hotel
The bed was extremely comfy staff super friendly HOT CHOCOLATE COOKIE ON ARRIVAL A decent check out time of 12 00 We will def look for this hotel when traveling to other cities

The bathroom was long and skinny so the sink was too crowded with the bathroom door closed Had to leave the door open This was despite the fact that the room was quite large Room needed another chair with wheels and could use a bureau for clothes It was easier to keep clothes in the suitcase   The staff at check in and at the restaurant were very helpful and friendly

No mini fridge beware as many different room types on offer and it s not all that clear which is which Also we were in the basement so tiny window near the roof and next to function suite so music was heard late into the night  Room was very clean and tidy

We arrived and departed from kings cross so Greenwich location was a bit far out somewhere closer on the tube line to kings cross would have made it simpler in hindsight The price was a factor in our choice and the hotel was as lovely and fair value for money  Good bed Good bar Comfortable Helpful staff

DLR and public buses are the only choice for public transportation and it takes almost 30 minutes to the city center but it s not that much problem   Comfortable and cleen rooms beds and cheery staff At the edge of zone 2 and not a difficult transportation Almost 200 meters to Deptford Bridge stop of DLR and public buses Breakfast was good enough Welcome cookie was a very good gesture and delicious also

The only slight problem was the cooked breakfast was quite slow to be replenished which meant I didn t get the full choice but what I did get was very good   The room was bright clean spacious and very comfortable and the lady on reception on our arrival was possibly one of the most helpful smiley and professional receptionists I have ever come across A great breakfast overall a very enjoyable stay
Initially being allocated a room next to the gym would have been noisy After complaining another room was allocated   Lovely quiet hotel with helpful staff

Location was a little further from Greenwich than I expected but luckily the DLR was close by   Staff were excellent Welcoming and helpful Really made breakfast a bright start to the day Very comfortable room with a super shower Got a great nights sleep It was a very hot weekend but the room was cool and had a super view of London

The staff are rude They dropped phone on me and took money out of my account and then did not explain that payment has already been requested while I paid with another card They are unapologetic for misinforming you of their fraudulent way of misleading on their payments Please be careful while making payment or reservations because the staff are not very clear on what their terms of payments are I specifically ask about payment and was still giving wrong information   The location
Doubletree by Hilton at Greenwich was a ex exceptionally clean and manicured property and very close to the DLR 200 m which was very important to us Breakfast was ideal and the room very comfortable

Car park was fully booked so we had to park quite some distance from the hotel and use the DLR not ideal I m not sure how much parking the hotel has available but it seems you do have to book a space so our fault I guess   Reception staff were excellent Friendly and very helpful with organising taxis etc

The only problem I had was with heavy footed guests in the room above me who sounded like a heard of buffalo every night at midnight and every morning at 8 am In my room I would have liked a plug socket just outside the shower room so I could do my hair in the mirror   I was greeted well and when I asked to just view the room before taking my luggage in the manager guessed that I was exhausted and did not want to deal with the heavy case straight away and brought it up to my room for me The staff were friendly and confident and I like that the tipping system in on the receipt so it gets added to the bill I was put in a new built room so it was fresh The food was amazing and I basically waited to eat in the evening at the hotel They have room service which is perfect for me The room lighting is controlled by remote I had a king room with complimentary drinks and a coffee machine and kettle and plenty of space to move around The plugs have usb portholes so you do not need an adapter There is a huge and comfortable bar at the hotel and had I not been so exhausted I would have spent plenty of time in there I stayed for two days and I came here because I was staying at the stay city apartments round the corner and could not stand another night at that place I wish I had moved here sooner This hotel is great and I would return

I don t like being forced to have a credit card charged with a deposit  Very convenient for access to Greenwich and the City I stayed in this location before it became a DoubleTree and the most noticeable factor this time was the dramatic improvement in the manners and demeanour of the staff who could not have been more helpful

On 3rd day breakfast was abysmal I had to ask for almost everything The person on the breakfast area did not fill up at all In the end I was embarrassed because I had to ask for so much and the female attending had a bit of an attitude problem Bread was low all end bits she was argumentative melon only one type there just came to the stage that I couldn t ask anymore No butter apparently on 3rd day they didn t have individual packets one had to ask and it would have been cut handy if one had been informed in advance Orange juice only had dregs I asked for ham this had also run out So she brought beef then proceeded to use the FISH fork to put some on my plate needless to say I didn t have any she needs training and an attitude transplant   Breakfast was very good for first 2 days

Staff were very accommodating pleasant to talk to and overall excellent customer service Our room was lovely which made up for the car park outlook Everything was very clean we would definitely stay here again

the room was very small and on the lower ground floor the basement the view was of a wall and some astro turf we asked for 2 singles we actually got what I would describe as a Scandinavian double as there was no room at all between the beds the kettle was tucked in a corner and difficult to use safely there were only 2 tea bags for 2people all day and no biscuits at all and non of the supposedly delicious cookies the hotel advertises the desk dressing table was unusable as there was no room for someone to sit and another to pass behind the young lady on check in was quite blunt and not at all helpful until my daughter berated her   the location only a ten minute walk to the curry Sark and the river boats

We weren t keen on the foggy glass door to the bathroom found it a little intrusive with not a 100 privacy   The staff were really friendly and very helpful we had a snack before the concert and have to say the cheesey chips were the best we ve had totally recommend staying at this hotel Breakfast was plentiful and had good choices The staff were very attentive and cheerful

No notice taken on booking requests Asked for non smoking high room and parking Offered originally no parking low room overlooking car park with linen bag store overflowing Price offered to guests on arrival seemed far better than your site  Breakfast
Breakfast was a disaster Cookers not working no butter two days Ina row Staff not interested in complaint Lift broken Rooms not cleaned Dirty glasses that sat for four days  Lication

30 mins delay in checking in room not ready UPGRADE ROOM VERY SMALL NO DRAWERS FOR STORAGE TINY HANGING AREA AND BED RIGHT OPPOSITE INCOMING DOOR RESTAURANT RAN OUT OF HOT BREAKFAST ITEMS SO 20 MINUTE WAIT   COMFORTABLE BED NESPRESSO COFFEE IN ROOM UPGRADE OF ROOM DUE TO DELAY

The shower could have been better designed as it tended to drench the bathroom floor but that is a minor niggle   Very spacious comfortable twin bedded room well decorated attractively furnished an extremely pleasant surprise Great staff who really tried very hard to keep everyone happy and succeeded An extremely well run hotel

Room was a bit small ideal for 1 or 2 nights But this is London and it wasn t cramped in the slightest given the price it was about right Main negative was the sliding glass door to the shower room which offered little in the way of privacy so only suitable for intimate couples   Exceptional staff lovely fresh cookie provided while checking in Plenty of staff on hand as well Much better than some hotels where 1 person gets left of reception to do everything Room was small and functional but all done to high standard Wifi worked well Car park at the back was a bargain for London at 17 overnight and a smooth drive in only being about 20 mins from the M25 Very close to the DLR so good for concerts at O2 and Stratford Cracking breakfast with plenty of options good quality produce and extras such a muffins Smooth check out Will definitely return again next time we have the chance

Breakfast organisation was a shambles Buffet style breakfast ran out of hot food and had to wait ten minutes for replenishment which then went immediately because of the queue that had built up Senior staff asked to resolve showed no interest in doing so  Accommodation was fine

No cooked breakfast available We weren t late but all that was left was a few beans and hash brown Not clear why as we were initially told chef was cooking some more as they hadn t expected some many breakfasts needed Then told that there was no gas and then told there had been an incident We were given complimentary drinks in the bar that evening and our breakfasts were deducted from the bill All a bit strange but could have been better communication   Staff were lovely Bar is beautifully designed

Cant think of anything  On arrival staff were very professional courteous and helpful and this continued throughout our short stay We will certainly return as it was very close to where we wanted to be which was the Royal College at Greenwich
The breakfast was overly priced   This is a great hotel Very accommodating staff they relocated us to a room with a bath upon request comfortable beds and nice quiet surroundings We ll go back

Size of the bed  When I booked the hotel I choose to have the queen bed I was surprised because it s just the size of a double bed It s not really a problem though Apart from that everything is superb Staff are very friendly and enthusiastic Great place to stay I will recommend to my family and friends

The location is not the best It is convenient for visiting the sights in Greenwich however But the impressive building suffers from being in a fairly run down area It is just slightly on the wrong side of the tracks  The staff were very helpful Except the bar staff who tried to serve double measures as standard when the bar list clearly showed singles available However they reacted well when this was pointed out Also the views from our corner room on the 7th floor were wonderful Nice wide bed too And great shower
Only fault was the bar music we could hear in our room until at least 12 30 when I pulled out the earplugs otherwise couldn t fault it   Lovely hotel
Small room windows were draughty and allowed a lot of noise in throughout the night The shower room having a sliding door is rubbish For the money Montcalm are much better  The staff were superb

N A  Very friendly greeting upon arrival Room was stunning very luxurious Food and drinks in the bar was extremely nice The chips were amazing and would definitely recommend trying a few cocktails Comfortable nights sleep We would definitely return and stay here again

The aircondition not work at our week and it was the hotes days in london At tusday the hotel gave as mini air condition who made noise and we not sleep well Sad they not moove as to another room or give as something to sutesfight us  It was a nice and clean hotel
Great hotel with a fantastic location the room was very clean and a great little layout but above all the staff were excellent and always ready to help plus free cookies always helps

I wish I had a bathtub instead of a shower as I had stayed for a few days Also I wish there was spa facilities   The room was nice and cosy the bed and pillows was all very comfortable and the staff was very accommodating Cleanliness was upto standard and the decor was very modern

The room was supposed to be a queen this was not the case The shower room looked fabulous but in reality when you put the shower on it flooded the whole bathroom   The hotel was convenient to the tube It was clean and friendly Loved the cookies on arrival this was a nice touch The room reflected the area of London that we were in Lots of interesting facts and pictures

Room 20 next to gym Every morning 6o clock the sound of the treadmill horrible wake up call  We liked everything except how we were treated when the air conditioner broke It broke the day before we were leaving When we returned that evening it was still broke We were told this before we returned to our room and offered to move us to another room As we were checking out the next day at 12 it didn t seem practical and we availed of a portable air conditioner However the next morning around 11 15 just as we were packing up showering Tec we received a call from reception to say maintenance was on the way We asked for 15mins to finish of packing and were told NO Not best pleased

The breakfast was delicious with lots of choice and variety The pancake machine was the highlight of my stay Lovely filter coffee and access to a diy coffee machine for cappuccino and lattes Cooked breakfast was help yourself but refreshed often and kept nice and hot

The staff were very rude throughout whole stay Did not get a warm cookie upon check in Staff were shocked when I asked for extra towels even though the cleaner left a message saying that if we need any towels the reception counter would be happy to help but they were not Reception give rude and unpleasant looks whenever we entered or left the reception hall and made us feel unwelcome Tried to overcharged by 50 pounds and then tried to overcharge by 100 pounds that was never stated while booking Had to make sure I didn t get over charged Restaurant was overpriced as was room service There is not much in location around it   Close to underground

Sink was clogged no view from window ceiling height   Excellent bed window can be opened for fresh air no streetnoise so excellent sleep for London standards Walking distance from Deptford Bridge station Very kind reception upon arrival efficient check in
Nothing everything was a absolute pleasure  The hotel was pure luxury The staff was just unbelievably friendly and helpful have never had better service they bent over backwards to help you
Took an hour to find us a suitable room The room service was slow but the food was nice when it arrived   Very friendly and helpful staff Nice location Food was excellent

te air conditioning was bad it was very hot in the room i asked staff for a fan but they never had any there was no cookies in our room and the staff said she would bring them later but she never came back far to hot in the room they need to sort out the air con   the room was clean and a nice size

The room was too hot mych hotter thsan the public areas The air conditioning in the room only went to 19 degrees whereas you could turn the heating down to 17 degrees we called a service engineer who confirmed this was correct The room was very hot

I don t recall any issues at all   Fantastic converted period building in quiet leafy Greenwich Very close to the hustle and bustle of Deptford and all the maritime history and cultural activities in Greenwich Very close to public transport Parking was convenient arriving on Saturday afternoon as it is free on Sunday could be expensive otherwise Room was gorgeous with a lovely view Usual Hilton high standards of bed bedding toiletries shower cleanliness etc etc As it is Doubletree you get a delicious hot gooey cookie on arrival which is always welcome
I thought car parking was included in the price but was extra and quite expensive for I night The breakfast too I thought was quite expensive 38 for two No mini bar in room  Good breakfast selection

Squeaky beds in our twin room Kettle and cups were in the bottom of the wardrobe 3 day stay resulted in 51 extra for parking not mentioned on Booking com   The room was quiet up on the 6th floor Safe provided in room for no charge Friendly staff
Room a little small but still a good stay   We had a lovely stay check in was quick and was able to park for free Staff friendly and helpful Room was very clean and comfortable bed

Air conditioning did not work making the room unbearable warm Called reception and there was nothing they could do Also no view Looked out to generators and a wall   Staff were friendly and hotel was clean
No bad experiences  I picked this hotel as I wanted somewhere close to the DLR for transport to London Friendly helpful staff no problems whatsoever

I would of given this hotel top marks across the board but we had a unnecessary altercation with the bar manager one night who was just plain rude and unhelpful   Lovely room very comfy bed and exceptionally comfy pillows Very good selection of food for breakfast good quality sausages which is always a good sign gun of overall quality
Nothing  I could not fault the hotel Facilities rooms location and staff all brilliant Top class value for money Would highly recommend to everyone

The hotel was a little bit further than I expected it to be but even though it took me only 10 minutes to get to Canary Wharf where you can find a bit more facilities to enjoy   I really liked interior and the view from my window Breakfast was great I really liked hotel staff everyone was very helpful The access to the railway was very easy only 3 5 minutes walking Very comfortable bed I enjoyed my weekend stay a lot

The reception staff did not notify us of the breakfast offer until after we had already arranged to eat so it was too late to take advantage of it It had to be prebooked   Lovely dining room and bar area better laid out than most

We had 2 keycards but i had to get down twice 2 different days because it didnt work   Breakfast was great Standard twin rooms were bigger than usual twin rooms elsewhere And there was a lot of staff all day and they were always friendly and smiling
Perfect for our concert to O2 but travelling in and out of central London quite long   Excellent stay lovely helpful staff and the cookie is always welcome

Absolutely beautiful hotel with incredible staff We arrived at 7pm and were met by 2 lovely receptionists who booked us quickly into our room along with 2 very yummy chocolate chip cookies believe me take them when they offer we asked for more the following day We were going to the O2 to watch Bruno Mars and were running behind schedule so I was panicking when we arrived however the receptionists couldn t have put me more at ease they checked us in quickly and escorted us to our room The room itself was perfect a lovely size for the two of us I went with my boyfriend and was spotless It had everything you would need for an overnight stay we even were provided with toothbrushes at our request after forgetting ours and it was no bother at all to the staff They were constantly smiling and very friendly For the price I paid for the room I would 100 recommend it to anyone looking for a beautiful hotel to stay in Uber s are available within 4 minutes of ordering and I honestly cannot fault the hotel Only thing I would say is I wish I ordered room service as the food looked incredible It was a 25 minute uber to Westminster which I think was 14 which was was ideal We spent the whole day being tourists and had a fabulous trip away mainly done to our stay at DoubleTree
